docket_entries.description: LETTER FROM AARON HOKAMURA RE REFUSAL TO BE RECIPIENT OF SUBSTITUTED SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT CHERIE HOKAMURA.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,345.43 FILED BY ROSEN, JARED AS TO DEFENDANT HOKAMURA, CHERIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S DECLARATION FILED. UNABLE TO SERVE DEFT AND REQUESTED NEW LATER COURT DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-12-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-07-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOKAMURA, CHERIE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-12-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-13-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCE, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLEMENT PENDING.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOKAMURA, CHERIE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT FOR PROGRESS REPORT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
